opinion.h: CEPERO v. UNITED STATES. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 1227, Misc. Decided May 27, 1963.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox for the United States.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
373 U.S. 544 SMITH v. KANSAS ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 966, Misc. Decided May 27, 1963.
William M. Ferguson, Attorney General of Kansas, and J. Richard Foth and Park McGee, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
